task_completion.description: Agent opens the dwanko_run.tnz scene in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is visible with the 'dwanko_run' scene loaded. The scene name should be visible in the title bar or xsheet, and the character animation should be visible in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the output/camera resolution to 720x576 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' or 'Camera Settings' dialog is open, showing the Width set to 720 and Height set to 576.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the frame rate to 25 fps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' or 'Scene Settings' dialog shows the Frame Rate (fps) value explicitly set to 25.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the output format to PNG and the destination path to the pal_delivery folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Output Settings' dialog, the 'Save In' path is set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pal_delivery/' (or similar valid relative path) and the file format dropdown is set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Agent renders the animation and generates at least 25 PNG frames in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar is shown completing in OpenToonz, OR a file manager/terminal window displays the contents of the 'pal_delivery' folder containing a sequence of .png files (e.g., 0001.png to 0025.png or higher).

integrity.description: Agent actually used OpenToonz to perform the reconfiguration and rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenToonz GUI being actively used (menus opened, settings changed, render initiated) rather than just running a background script or copying files in the terminal.

integrity.description: The rendered PNG files contain the actual animation frames, not blank or dummy images.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the rendered files are previewed or shown as thumbnails in a file manager, they should depict the 'dwanko_run' character animation, not empty/black images.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands like 'touch' or 'convert' to fake the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history (if visible) should not show commands that artificially create dummy .png files in the output directory to bypass the rendering process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The target resolution must be exactly 720x576 pixels. The target framerate must be exactly 25 fps. The output must be a PNG sequence saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pal_delivery/' containing at least 25 frames. The rendered files should have a total size of at least 150KB.
